name: ppopp-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for PPoPP (ACM SIGPLAN Symposium on Principles and Practice of Parallel Programming): venue routing against PLDI/CGO/POPL/SC/ASPLOS, the two-column acmart sigplan 10-page format, double-blind HotCRP submission with an author-response rebuttal, concurrency-correctness and parallel-performance evidence (scalability, NUMA, GPU, lock-free/wait-free structures, memory models), the co-located HPCA/CGO/PPoPP/CC week, and the CGO-shared ACM artifact-evaluation badges. Grounded in the PPoPP 2026 (Sydney) and PPoPP 2027 (Salt Lake City) researchr calls, sigplan.org announcements, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
